executives.name: Alyssa Henry
executives.background: Alyssa Henry has been a director since 2020. She was previously CEO of Square (now Block, Inc.) and held leadership roles at Amazon Web Services and Microsoft.

executives.name: Egon Durban
executives.background: Co-CEO of Silver Lake, a global technology investment firm.
